---SHEET2---
' && unzip -p [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml | sed -n '1,12p' && printf '
---SHEET3---
' && unzip -p [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml | sed -n '1,14p'
label: unknown
